sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90381" key="prosxoreu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσχορεύω</orth>, <sense id="n90381.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dance to the sound of</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">αὐλοῖς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:81" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.81</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
